ai.customInstructionsLabel: Additional instructions applied to all generations
ai.customInstructionsPlaceholder: Additional instructions for all AI generations (e.g., 'I'm recovering from a knee injury')

providers.empty: No providers configured. Add one below.
providers.label: Label

models.hint: Add at least one provider and select an active profile to choose models.

sync.description: Sync your workouts and settings across devices through your own Google Drive. Data lives on your Drive; no Kaiord server is involved.
sync.plaintextWarning: Your saved AI API keys will be uploaded without end-to-end encryption. Enable encryption below to protect them.

privacy.infoNoServer: We do not store your credentials on any server.
privacy.infoGarmin: Garmin integration uses a browser extension that piggybacks on your existing Garmin Connect session. No credentials leave your browser.
privacy.infoTrain2go: Train2Go import uses a browser extension that reads the coaching plan displayed on Train2Go pages you are already viewing. It does not read your password or authentication tokens.
privacy.infoLlmKeys: LLM API keys are sent directly to the provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google) — Kaiord does not receive or relay this data.
privacy.infoNotResponsible: We are not responsible for credential security on your device.
privacy.analyticsOutro: to track aggregate usage (page views, workout generation, exports). No cookies are set and no personal data is collected.
privacy.clearAllHint: This removes all stored API keys from your browser.

usage.title: AI Usage
usage.heading: AI Usage — last {{count}} months
usage.empty: No AI usage recorded yet for the last {{count}} months. The panel will populate automatically after your first batch run.
usage.footnoteBefore: Values reflect actual usage recorded per batch run — not the pre-run estimate shown in the confirmation dialog. Rows marked
usage.footnoteAfter: are from a legacy schema where the input / output split was not captured.

extensions.garminHint: Open Garmin Connect and navigate around

notifications.unsupported: Notifications aren't supported in this browser.
notifications.blocked: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
